title: War Pigs
why_this_song: War Pigs by Black Sabbath (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "minds" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "minds" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yeah" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yeah" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Wait till their judgement day comes, yeah!

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Just like witches at black masses
They leave that role to the poor, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "War Pigs" was released in 1970. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "War Pigs" foi lançada em 1970. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "War Pigs" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "War Pigs" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "War Pigs" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "War Pigs" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
